name: Potato Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat. Add mashed potatoes, vanilla, and salt. Mix well.
3. Sift confectioners sugar into a large bowl.
4. Add the chocolate mixture to the sugar, mixing thoroughly.
5. The mixture will be crumbly. Add 1-2 tablespoons of milk if necessary to make it kneadable.
6. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth.
7. Shape the dough into two rolls, each about 12 inches long and 1-1/4 inches in diameter.
8. Roll the dough in coconut or walnuts.
9. Cut into 1/2 inch thick slices.
Makes 48 pieces. Origin: Farm Journal's Choice
Chocolate Recipes Shared by: Sharon Stevens
